events.content: fsnotify replaces polling for instant local change detection: fsnotify replaces polling for instant local change detection

raw.question: fsnotify replaces polling for instant local change detection
raw.chosen: fsnotify replaces polling for instant local change detection
raw.reasoning: Polling had 2-second delay. fsnotify uses OS-level notifications (inotify/FSEvents) for instant push. WebSocket handles pull. Polling kept as 30s reconciliation fallback.

events.content: Path-aware scope matching fixes .env leak: Path-aware scope matching fixes .env leak

raw.question: Path-aware scope matching fixes .env leak
raw.reasoning: scopeMatches was ignoring the path segment — token with relayfile:fs:read:/src/app.ts was granting read to all files including .env. scopeMatchesPath now checks path prefix matching.

events.content: .agentdeny command filter via shell preexec hook: .agentdeny command filter via shell preexec hook

raw.question: .agentdeny command filter via shell preexec hook
raw.chosen: .agentdeny command filter via shell preexec hook
raw.reasoning: Prevents operations like git push, sudo, rm -rf. Uses bash trap DEBUG and zsh preexec. Pattern matching against .agentdeny file.

retrospective.summary: Added fsnotify, path-aware scopes, canReadPath, agentdeny, readonly revert, and full test coverage. All tests passing.
